infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Captain's Log uses your microphone to capture voice notes for your journal entries.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Captain's Log uses your location to add place context to your journal entries.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Captain's Log lets you attach photos to your journal entries.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Captain's Log lets you capture photos for your journal entries.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Captain's Log to use your location to add place context to entries.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Captain's Log to access your photos to attach to entries.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Captain's Log to use the camera to capture photos for entries.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Captain's Log to access the microphone to record voice notes.
